prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 6.4L HEMI (EFI V8, engine code: 6.4L Apache) with a naturally aspirated 7.0L crate engine from Mopar Performance (part #P5155755), featuring forged internals, CNC-ported heads, and a custom camshaft (Comp Cams XFI 286HR) for 600+ HP at 6,500 RPM with 550 lb-ft of torque, paired with a Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission swap (Mopar part #P5155756) and a McLeod RST twin-disc clutch (part #8617) for durability.

Forced Induction: Install a ProCharger P-1SC-1 supercharger kit (part #1FA354) with a 4.10-inch pulley, intercooled with a custom Spearco front-mount intercooler (part #2-301B), tuned via a DiabloSport Trinity 2 (part #9245) with a custom 93-octane tune for 750+ WHP on E85, utilizing a Kooks 1 7/8-inch long-tube header (part #215025) and a Flowmaster Super 44 muffler (part #817683) for optimized scavenging.

Suspension & Handling: Upgrade to a Rock Krawler 4.5-inch X-Factor Stage 4 long-arm suspension kit (part #RK45XF-4) with Fox 2.5 Factory Series DSC coilovers (part #985-24-120) and Fox 2.0 Performance Series rear shocks (part #880-06-180), paired with TeraFlex Heavy-Duty adjustable control arms (part #1053000) and a Currie Enterprises Antirock sway bar (part #CE-9901) for articulation and stability.
estetica: Body: Install a Poison Spyder JK-392 Rocker Knocker rocker panel protection kit (part #10-04-100) with a custom matte military green wrap (3M 1080-M121), paired with a Rugged Ridge XHD front bumper (part #11546.11) and a Warn Zeon 12-S Platinum winch (part #103253) with synthetic rope (part #95960).

Wheels & Tires: Mount 17x9 Fuel Trophy wheels (part #FM-TROPHY-BLK) with a +12mm offset, wrapped in 37x12.50R17 Nitto Trail Grappler M/T tires (part #207-17) for aggressive off-road stance, paired with Synergy Manufacturing wheel spacers (part #SYN-5130) for proper clearance.

Lighting & Aero: Replace stock headlights with Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED pods (part #64031) and a Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light bar (part #567101), paired with a Slee Off-Road JK-392 high-clearance aluminum front fender flares (part #SLEE-JK-392-FF) and a custom rear diffuser from JCR Offroad (part #JCR-001) for reduced drag.
